# SL-IMG-005: twitter-image-non-success

<!-- Generated by scripts/generate-rule-docs.mjs. Do not edit by hand. -->

## Summary

Twitter image URL does not return a 2xx response.

## Metadata

- Category: Images and social preview (images-social-preview)
- Default severity: warning
- Confidence: certain
- Scope: page
- Provider scope: core
- Version: 1.0.0

## Evidence Sources

- http-header
- raw-html

## Required Evidence

- twitter-image-url
- final-status-code

## When This Triggers

Fetch declared twitter:image URL and inspect final HTTP status.

## False Positives

False positives are expected to be rare because this rule relies on
deterministic local evidence. Suppress only with a reason when the route
contract intentionally differs from the observed signal.

## How To Fix

Point twitter:image to a reachable image URL.

## Examples

Bad-case fixture reference:

- fixtures/images/twitter-image-non-success

Fixed direction:

- Point twitter:image to a reachable image URL.

selectors, or external observations beyond the catalog fixture references above.
